issues.title: Requirements & Analysis
issues.body: Translate business needs into a clear, prioritized product backlog that can be executed incrementally.

children.title: Define functional workflows
children.body: Identify functional workflows for Master Data, Movements, Inventory, and Reports. Document user roles and access levels for each workflow. Establish clear acceptance criteria for each feature.

children.title: Define user roles and access levels
children.body: Create role-based permission model for different user types. Define access levels for admin, warehouse staff, and managers. Establish security protocols for data protection.

children.title: Capture non-functional requirements
children.body: Document performance requirements for inventory transactions. Define security standards for data protection and user authentication. Establish audit trail requirements for compliance.

children.title: Create acceptance criteria for features
children.body: Establish measurable criteria for feature completion. Define testing requirements for each functional module. Document success metrics for system validation.

issues.title: Architecture & Design
issues.body: Create a stable technical foundation that supports parallel development and future scaling.

children.title: Finalize application architecture design
children.body: Design desktop application with layered, service-based architecture. Establish module boundaries between Master Data, Movements, and Inventory. Define data flow patterns between system components.

children.title: Define module boundaries and interfaces
children.body: Establish clear interfaces between different system modules. Define data transfer objects for inter-module communication. Document API contracts for external system integration.

children.title: Database and integration design
children.body: Design MySQL database schema for warehouse operations. Create PHP API endpoints for external system integration. Establish data synchronization protocols.

children.title: UI/UX structure and navigation design
children.body: Design main navigation flow between system modules. Create consistent form layout patterns. Establish responsive table designs for data presentation.

children.title: Security and authorization design
children.body: Implement JWT-based authentication for system access. Design role-based permission system. Establish audit logging for security compliance.

issues.title: Development Phase 1 - Core System Functionality
issues.body: Build the functional backbone of the system so that core warehouse operations are executable end-to-end.

children.title: Infrastructure & Core Forms Development
children.body: Complete infrastructure, database, PHP API. Develop ALL Master Data Forms (materials, vendors, customers, bins, zones, users). Build Core Movement Forms (GR Purchase Order, GI Sales Order, Putaway TO, Picking TO). Implement Inventory Service for movement support.

children.title: Database & PHP API Foundation
children.body: Complete database schema design and implementation. Develop all PHP API endpoints (Material, Vendor, Customer, PurchaseOrder, SalesOrder). Implement authentication and security protocols.

children.title: DATABASE & PHP API Implementation
children.body: Design normalized database schema for warehouse operations. Create RESTful API endpoints for all core entities. Implement token-based authentication system.

children.title: JAVA CORE APPLICATION Development
children.body: Develop Main.java as application entry point. Build MainFrame.java for basic application structure. Create LoginDialog.java for authentication UI. Implement DatabaseConfig.java and DBConnection.java for database connectivity.

children.title: Infrastructure & Master Data Forms Development
children.body: Complete MainFrame.java with menu system. Develop MenuBuilder.java and DashboardPanel.java. Create MaterialMasterForm.java and VendorForm.java. Implement utility classes for date, number, validation, and alerts.

children.title: JAVA INFRASTRUCTURE Development
children.body: Complete MainFrame.java with menu system and navigation. Develop MenuBuilder.java for dynamic menu creation. Create DashboardPanel.java for system overview. Implement utility classes for common operations.

children.title: MASTER DATA FORMS Implementation
children.body: Develop MaterialMasterForm.java for material management. Create VendorForm.java for vendor data management. Implement CRUD operations with validation. Add search and filtering capabilities.

children.title: Inventory Service & Query Form Development
children.body: Implement InventoryService.java with core inventory logic. Develop increaseInventory(), decreaseInventory(), transferInventory() methods. Create validateAvailability() and FIFO logic. Build InventoryQueryForm.java for basic inventory visibility.

children.title: INVENTORY SERVICE Implementation
children.body: Develop InventoryService.java with core business logic. Implement increaseInventory() for goods receipt operations. Create decreaseInventory() for goods issue transactions. Build transferInventory() for internal movements.

children.title: INVENTORY QUERY FORM Development
children.body: Create InventoryQueryForm.java for stock level queries. Implement filtering by material, batch, or location. Display real-time inventory data. Support basic reporting functions.

children.title: Phase 1 Demo Preparation & Testing
children.body: Execute end-to-end workflow testing. Verify demo data accuracy. Perform performance tuning. Fix integration bugs. Prepare demonstration scenarios.

children.title: Master Data Forms Development
children.body: Develop Material.java, Vendor.java, Customer.java models with DTOs and DAOs. Create CustomerForm.java and UOMForm.java. Build BatchManagementForm.java with search panels and filtering. Implement data validation rules.

children.title: Core Models & Initial Forms Development
children.body: Create Material.java, MaterialDTO.java, MaterialDAO.java models. Develop Vendor.java, VendorDTO.java, VendorDAO.java. Build Customer.java, CustomerDTO.java, CustomerDAO.java. Implement CustomerForm.java and UOMForm.java.

children.title: DATA MODELS & DAOS Implementation
children.body: Develop Material.java model with material attributes. Create MaterialDTO.java for data transfer. Build MaterialDAO.java for database operations. Implement similar structures for Vendor and Customer.

children.title: MasterR DATA FORMS Development (core)
children.body: Create CustomerForm.java for customer management. Develop UOMForm.java for unit of measure definition. Implement validation and duplicate checking. Add search and filter functionality.

children.title: Batch Management System Development
children.body: Develop MaterialBatch.java model for batch tracking. Create BatchManagementForm.java for batch operations. Implement batch search and filtering. Add data validation for batch information.

children.title: Master Data Integration Testing & Enhancement
children.body: Fix bugs found during integration testing. Improve UI/UX based on user feedback. Create seed data for demonstration scenarios. Test integration with other developers' modules.

children.title: Master Data Demo Preparation
children.body: Create demonstration materials, vendors, and customers. Show batch tracking setup and configuration. Test data consistency across all master tables. Prepare demo scenarios for client review.

children.title: Warehouse Structure Development
children.body: Develop Warehouse.java, StorageBin.java, Zone.java models with DTOs and DAOs. Create BinManagementForm.java and ZoneManagementForm.java. Implement MovementService.java basic structure. Support InventoryService integration with GR and GI movements.

children.title: Warehouse Models & Bin Management Development
children.body: Create Warehouse.java, WarehouseDTO.java, WarehouseDAO.java. Develop StorageBin.java, BinDTO.java, StorageBinDAO.java. Build Zone.java, ZoneDTO.java, ZoneDAO.java. Implement BinManagementForm.java for bin operations.

children.title: WAREHOUSE MODELS Implementation
children.body: Develop Warehouse.java model with warehouse attributes. Create WarehouseDTO.java for data transfer. Build WarehouseDAO.java for database operations. Implement similar structures for StorageBin and Zone.

children.title: BIN MANAGEMENT FORM Development
children.body: Create BinManagementForm.java for storage location management. Implement bin creation, editing, and deletion. Add capacity tracking and status monitoring. Support bulk operations for multiple bins.

children.title: Zone Management System Development
children.body: Develop ZoneManagementForm.java for zone operations. Implement zone creation and assignment logic. Add zone-specific validation rules. Support zone-based reporting.

children.title: Movement Service Support Implementation
children.body: Create MovementService.java basic structure. Ensure InventoryService integration with GR movements. Support InventoryService integration with GI movements. Implement bin validation for movement operations.

children.title: Warehouse Setup Demo Preparation
children.body: Create main warehouse structure with multiple zones. Set up all required bin types for operations. Test warehouse operations with sample data. Demonstrate zone-based storage strategies.

children.title: Inbound Movements Development
children.body: Develop PurchaseOrder.java, POItem.java models (read-only). Create PurchaseOrderDAO.java for reading from PHP database. Build GRPurchaseOrderDTO.java for data transfer. Implement GRPurchaseOrderForm.java (IN11) and GRCustomerReturnsForm.java (IN12).

children.title: Purchase Order Foundation & IN11 Form Development
children.body: Create PurchaseOrder.java and POItem.java models. Develop PurchaseOrderDAO.java for database operations. Build GRPurchaseOrderDTO.java for goods receipt data. Implement GRPurchaseOrderForm.java (IN11) for purchase order receipt.

children.title: PURCHASE ORDER MODELS Implementation
children.body: Develop PurchaseOrder.java model with purchase order details. Create POItem.java for line item information. Build PurchaseOrderDAO.java for database access. Implement GRPurchaseOrderDTO.java for goods receipt data.

children.title: IN11 GR Purchase Order FORM Development
children.body: Create GRPurchaseOrderForm.java for goods receipt against purchase orders. Implement validation of purchase order details. Support partial receipt quantities. Integrate with InventoryService for stock updates.

children.title: IN11 Enhancements & Integration
children.body: Implement better validation messages for user feedback. Add batch number format validation. Develop expiry date logic validation. Improve integration with inventory updates.

children.title: IN12 Customer Returns Form Development
children.body: Create GRCustomerReturnsForm.java (IN12) for customer returns processing. Implement return authorization validation. Support inspection and disposition workflows. Integrate with inventory adjustment logic.

children.title: Inbound Movements Demo Preparation
children.body: Show purchase order in PHP system interface. Load purchase order in Java GR form for processing. Demonstrate partial quantity receipt. Post GR with batch details and show inventory updates.

children.title: Outbound Movements Development
children.body: Develop MovementHeader.java, MovementItem.java, MovementType.java models. Create MovementDTO.java, MovementDAO.java, MovementTypeDAO.java. Implement GISalesOrderForm.java (OUT14) and ReturnToVendorForm.java (OUT15). Enhance MovementService.java with createGRMovement(), createGIMovement() methods.

children.title: Movement Foundation & OUT14 Form Development
children.body: Create MovementHeader.java, MovementItem.java, MovementType.java models. Develop MovementDTO.java, MovementDAO.java, MovementTypeDAO.java. Implement GISalesOrderForm.java (OUT14) for sales order processing.

children.title: MOVEMENT MODELS Implementation
children.body: Develop MovementHeader.java for movement transaction headers. Create MovementItem.java for line item details. Build MovementType.java for movement type definitions. Implement DAO classes for database operations.

children.title: OUT14 GI Sales Order FORM Development
children.body: Create GISalesOrderForm.java for goods issue against sales orders. Implement sales order validation. Support FIFO batch selection. Integrate with InventoryService for stock reduction.

children.title: Movement Service Enhancement
children.body: Enhance MovementService.java with createGRMovement() method. Implement createGIMovement() for goods issue operations. Develop validateMovement() for transaction validation. Create validateStockAvailability() for inventory checks.

children.title: OUT15 Return to Vendor Form Development
children.body: Create ReturnToVendorForm.java (OUT15) for vendor returns processing. Implement vendor return authorization validation. Support documentation and approval workflows. Integrate with inventory adjustment processes.

children.title: Outbound Movements Demo Preparation
children.body: Show sales order in PHP system interface. Load sales order in Java GI form for processing. Demonstrate system bin suggestions using FIFO logic. Post GI movement and show inventory decrease.

children.title: Transfer Orders Development
children.body: Develop TransferOrder.java, TransferOrderItem.java models. Create TransferOrderDTO.java, TransferOrderDAO.java. Implement PutawayTOForm.java (TR22) and PickingTOForm.java (TR23). Build ValidationService.java with basic validation methods.

children.title: Transfer Foundation & TR22 Form Development
children.body: Create TransferOrder.java and TransferOrderItem.java models. Develop TransferOrderDTO.java and TransferOrderDAO.java. Build PutawayTODTO.java for putaway data. Implement PutawayTOForm.java (TR22) for putaway operations.

children.title: TRANSFER MODELS Implementation
children.body: Develop TransferOrder.java model for transfer transaction headers. Create TransferOrderItem.java for line item details. Build TransferOrderDTO.java for data transfer. Implement TransferOrderDAO.java for database operations.

children.title: TR22 Putaway TO FORM Development
children.body: Create PutawayTOForm.java for transfer from receiving to storage. Implement bin validation and compatibility checks. Support batch tracking during transfers. Integrate with InventoryService for stock movement.

children.title: TR23 Picking TO Form Development
children.body: Create PickingTOForm.java (TR23) for picking operations. Implement picking list generation. Support route optimization for picking efficiency. Integrate with staging area preparation.

children.title: Validation Service Implementation
children.body: Develop ValidationService.java with validateBinExists() method. Implement validateBinActive() for bin status checks. Create validateMaterialExists() for material validation. Build validateQuantityPositive() for quantity validation.

children.title: Transfer Orders Demo Preparation
children.body: Connect PutawayTO with GR (from Developer 4). Connect PickingTO with GI (from Developer 5). Test complete flow: GR → PutawayTO → PickingTO → GI. Demonstrate inventory tracking through all transfer stages.

issues.title: Development Phase 2 - Completion & Enhancements
issues.body: Complete the remaining 50% of functional scope while stabilizing and preparing the system for real-world usage.

children.title: First Round - Remaining Forms Development
children.body: Develop remaining warehouse movements including returns, transfers, adjustments, cycle count, and scrap. Create ALL Inventory Query & Monitoring Forms. Build ALL Reports Forms. Implement system polish and optimization.

children.title: Infrastructure Developer Forms Round 1
children.body: Create DailyActivityForm.java for daily activity reports. Develop GRTransferInForm.java (IN13) for transfer receipt movements.

children.title: Master Data Developer Forms Round 1
children.body: Build UserManagementForm.java for user administration. Create StockAgingForm.java for aging stock reports.

children.title: Warehouse Developer Forms Round 1
children.body: Develop StockOverviewForm.java for comprehensive stock views. Create BatchTrackingForm.java for detailed batch monitoring.

children.title: Inbound Developer Forms Round 1
children.body: Build GIInternalConsumptionForm.java (OUT16) for internal consumption. Create BinToBinTransferForm.java (INT17) for internal transfers.

children.title: Outbound Developer Forms Round 1
children.body: Develop CycleCountForm.java (INT19) for inventory counting. Create InventoryAdjustmentForm.java (ADJ20) for stock adjustments.

children.title: Transfer Developer Forms Round 1
children.body: Build ReplenishmentTOForm.java (TR24) for stock replenishment. Create SplittingPackBreakForm.java (INT18) for material splitting.

children.title: Second Round - Final Forms & Reports
children.body: Complete remaining reports and analytics modules. Implement functional enhancements and refinements. Perform system polish and optimization.

children.title: Infrastructure Developer Forms Round 2
children.body: Create InventoryValuationForm.java for financial valuation reports. Develop ScrapWriteoffForm.java (ADJ21) for scrap management.

children.title: Master Data Developer Forms Round 2
children.body: Build PerformanceReportForm.java for system performance analytics. Create StockLevelForm.java for inventory level monitoring.

children.title: Warehouse Developer Forms Round 2
children.body: Develop ExpiryMonitorForm.java for expiry date tracking. Create InventoryAlertsForm.java for threshold-based alerts.

children.title: Inbound Developer Final Forms
children.body: Create UtilizationReportForm.java for warehouse utilization analysis.

children.title: Outbound Developer Final Forms
children.body: Build FinancialReportForm.java for financial analysis and cost reporting.

children.title: System Polish & Bug Fixes Phase
children.body: Perform system-wide validation enhancements. Fix remaining bugs across all modules. Optimize performance and user experience.

children.title: System Integration & Optimization Phase
children.body: Execute cross-module integration testing. Perform performance optimization. Implement UI/UX improvements. Complete bug fixing and user acceptance testing.

children.title: Cross-Module Integration Testing
children.body: Test integration between Master Data and Movement modules. Validate inventory updates across all transaction types. Verify reporting accuracy with live data.

children.title: Performance Optimization Implementation
children.body: Optimize database queries for faster response times. Improve service layer performance. Enhance UI responsiveness for large datasets.

children.title: Team Focus Areas Finalization
children.body: Refine movement services for better performance. Optimize data quality and reporting accuracy. Enhance workflow automation for operational efficiency.

children.title: Final Polish & Documentation Phase
children.body: Prepare system for deployment and handover. Create complete documentation set. Conduct knowledge transfer sessions.

children.title: Infrastructure Documentation Creation
children.body: Prepare system deployment documentation. Complete security audit documentation. Create infrastructure architecture documentation.

children.title: Master Data Documentation Creation
children.body: Create master data management guides. Develop user training materials. Document data import/export procedures.

children.title: Inventory Documentation Creation
children.body: Document inventory system operations. Create warehouse setup guides. Develop stock management procedures.

children.title: Inbound Processes Documentation
children.body: Document inbound receiving processes. Create receiving workflow guides. Develop quality inspection procedures.

children.title: Outbound Processes Documentation
children.body: Document outbound shipping processes. Create movement system architecture documentation. Develop shipping and dispatch procedures.

children.title: Transfer Operations Documentation
children.body: Document transfer operations procedures. Create validation rules documentation. Develop internal movement guidelines.

issues.title: Testing & Quality Assurance
issues.body: Ensure quality is built into development, not treated as a late-stage activity, while still reserving time for final system-level QA after development completion.

children.title: Embedded Testing During Development Phase
children.body: Execute unit testing during feature development. Perform integration testing across modules. Validate business workflows per sprint. Conduct early defect detection and fixes.

children.title: Final System Testing Phase
children.body: Execute end-to-end system testing. Perform regression testing across all modules. Validate performance and security requirements. Support user acceptance testing procedures.

issues.title: Release Phase
issues.body: Prepare the system for real-world usage.

children.title: System Hardening & Optimization
children.body: Execute system hardening and optimization. Complete final bug fixes. Perform performance tuning and stress testing.

children.title: Release Preparation & Deployment
children.body: Release, create release notes and versioning information. Develop installation instructions and rollback procedures. Document known issues and workarounds.

issues.title: Documentation, Training & Handover Phase
issues.body: Ensure smooth adoption and long-term maintainability.

children.title: User Manuals Creation
children.body: Create comprehensive user manuals. Develop quick reference guides. Prepare troubleshooting documentation.

children.title: Technical Documentation Creation
children.body: Create administrator guides and technical documentation.
